checks.notes: Web sources report 3.12-3.3% TTM net margin. Facts bundle uses Oct 2025 report period (2.88%). The improvement reflects more recent periods including FY2026 Q4. Deviation 8.3% is within the 20% threshold.

Facts bundle report period is Oct 31, 2025. TTM operating margin through Oct 2025 per web sources is ~4.13%. The 5.3% deviation is within tolerance. Note: Jan 2026 quarter shows lower 2.97% operating margin due to seasonal effects.
Web sources consistently show 46.57-48.33 trailing P/E as of late April 2026. Facts bundle 48.21 falls within this range.

Revenue derived from facts bundle P/S ratio (1.5551) and market cap ($1.049T) implies ~$674B. Web reports $713.2B TTM (FY2026 full year including Q4 Jan 2026). The 5.4% gap reflects timing: facts use Oct 2025 TTM while web has full FY2026 data. Within the 20% threshold.
Web sources confirm $1.03-1.05T market cap. Facts bundle $1.049T is consistent.

Most authoritative sources (Yahoo Finance fiscal year, FinanceCharts TTM) show 21.03-21.85% ROE. Facts bundle 21.35% is consistent. GuruFocus shows lower 17.32% using a different equity base calculation, but the consensus from multiple sources validates our figure.

Web reports ROA (TTM) of 6.83% as of Apr 30, 2026. Facts bundle shows 7.45% using Oct 2025 report period. The 9.1% deviation reflects recent quarterly earnings decline (Q1 2026 net income fell ~37% YoY). Still within 20% threshold.

overall_status: all checks passed — no mismatches found
summary: All WMT metrics in the facts bundles are accurate within acceptable tolerances. The most notable observation is that ROA has drifted to 9.1% deviation as more recent quarters show lower earnings, but this remains below the 20% correction threshold. Net margin is improving trend vs. facts bundle value (3.12-3.3% web vs 2.88% in facts), reflecting FY2026 Q4 improvement. No corrections required.
